item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-12089 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-12089 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 4.9
Resumo:
The LWS Optimize – All-in-One Speed Booster & Cache Tools plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Arbitrary File Read in versions up to, and including, 3.3.19. This is due to the combine_current_css() function trusting values harvested from page HTML and converting same-site URLs to absolute filesystem paths before reading them with file_get_contents()/Minify\CSS::add(), without enforcing that the resolved path stay wi...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-12089

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-41568 - Docker
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-41568 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.1
Resumo:
In Docker Engine prior to version 29.5.1, Docker Daemon versions 28.5.2 and prior, and Moby Daemon prior to version 2.0.0-beta.14, a race condition during docker cp mount setup allows a malicious container to create empty files or directories at arbitrary absolute paths on the host filesystem. This issue has been patched in Docker Engine version 29.5.1 and Moby Daemon version 2.0.0-beta.14.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41568

item.title: [Segurança] Week in review: Exploited Check Point VPN zero-day, Oracle PeopleSoft servers under attack - Help Net Security
item.description:
💣 Week in review: Exploited Check Point VPN zero-day, Oracle PeopleSoft servers under attack - Help Net Security
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Check Point. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMizAFBVV95cUxNWG5PMnNsS3Z5NG5NZ1N3WUI0WV9Vc1Q1a19GQk83aXoyWXlNd1ItZFAwZS1CbTZJYy13N1VlWE9GRTl6SUlPdWpienNCejRZLVVTaFRaRWVZSVMtTnpUMzMyOFZxcE12eGo0SVdUQXFBbHkyMW5OTDNEZ0ZMQkx1S2RudWszbVlNYmFKUkRRbmhNN1pzdDRqN2xITm5jcVliQ2NfN3MyaHJKWjZZWWt6TlVuTkxkWmR5M2tOTzBSaF9mZVZVSk5INmE2UmY?oc=5

item.title: [Segurança] Over 400 Arch Linux AUR Packages Hijacked to Deploy Infostealer and eBPF Rootkit
item.description:
📰 Over 400 Arch Linux AUR Packages Hijacked to Deploy Infostealer and eBPF Rootkit
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Attackers took over more than 400 packages in the Arch User Repository (AUR) this week and rewrote their build scripts to install a credential stealer on any machine that built them. The malware is a Rust binary built to harvest developer secrets. When it lands with root, it can also load an eBPF rootkit to hide itself. The AUR is Arch Linux's community package collection, and it is separate
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/over-400-arch-linux-aur-packages.html

item.title: [Segurança] Over 400 Arch Linux packages compromised to push rootkit, infostealer
item.description:
📰 Over 400 Arch Linux packages compromised to push rootkit, infostealer
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
More than 400 packages in the Arch User Repository (AUR) are distributing a Linux rootkit and infostealer malware targeting credentials and access tokens.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/over-400-arch-linux-packages-compromised-to-push-rootkit-infostealer/

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] Search & Rescue Teams, K9s, Locate Missing Autistic Man, 50, Unresponsive But Alive In Edgewood Park - Patch
item.description:
📰 Search & Rescue Teams, K9s, Locate Missing Autistic Man, 50, Unresponsive But Alive In Edgewood Park - Patch
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia aborda atualização ou correção de segurança associada a Office, o que pode exigir validação e aplicação no ambiente.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
